title: Point of care compatible sample preparation buffer for direct SARS-CoV-2 detection in gargle samples
author: Posch, Barbara
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: The SARS-CoV-2 pandemic increased public interest in fast sample analysis of saliva or gargle samples. The gold standard for saliva or gargle sample processing still includes expensive and time-consuming RNA extraction. Here we propose a fast and simple sample treatment buffer (RACE buffer) as alternative for gargling samples, which is PCR compatible and applicable for point of care detection methods such as loop-mediated isothermal amplification (LAMP). These LAMP reactions can be verified with the naked eye, suggesting usage of the RACE buffer for either laboratory routine or point of care testing.
